englishDefinitions: A speaker placed inside or held near to the ear.
A receiver of a telephone to hold near to one's ear.
The arm on a pair of glasses that hooks over the ear to hold them in place.
persianTranslation: بلندگو در داخل یا نزدیک گوش قرار می گیرد.
گیرنده تلفن برای نزدیک کردن به گوش.
بازو روی یک جفت عینک که روی گوش قلاب می شود تا آنها را در جای خود نگه دارد.
examples: Holding the earpiece to my ear, I could hear him speaking clearly.
My glasses won't stay on, as I've broken the left earpiece.
